title: HyperDirector Edit Request
description: Structured instruction for a secondary edit pass on an existing generated video. Saved as edit-instructions.md (human) and passed to the agent as structured JSON.

edit_id.description: Optional unique identifier for this edit request. Useful for tracking iterative revisions. Example: edit-v2-20260507.

source_storyboard.description: Relative path to the storyboard.json being edited. Defaults to output/storyboard.json.

target_scene_ids.description: List of scene IDs to be modified. Use ['all'] to apply edits to every scene.

items.description: Scene identifier in format scene_01 ... scene_12, or the literal string 'all'.

edit_type.description: Primary category of the edit. Guides the agent on which parts of the storyboard to touch. copy_rewrite = text/caption only; visual_redesign = layout and animation; timing_adjust = duration changes only; full_regenerate = rebuild from scratch using revised brief.

user_instruction.description: Plain-language instruction from the user describing what to change and why. The agent treats this as the primary directive.

reference_examples.description: Optional list of reference materials (images, URLs, or file paths) illustrating the desired direction.

value.description: The URL, relative file path, or plain-text description.

note.description: What aspect of this reference to borrow. Example: 'use its color palette' or 'match this pacing'.

preserve_brand.description: If true, the edit must keep all brand-kit colors, fonts, and motion language intact. Set to false only for full brand refresh edits.

preserve_timing.description: If true, scene durations must not change during the edit. Only copy and visuals may be modified.

preserve_scenes.description: Scene IDs explicitly excluded from modification, even if they fall within target_scene_ids.

tone_override.description: If provided, override the brand voice tone for this edit only. Example: 'more playful, less formal'.

expected_output.description: Describes what the agent should produce as the result of this edit.

format.description: updated_storyboard_json = rewrite storyboard.json only; updated_html = rewrite index.html only; updated_both = rewrite both; patch_only = return a diff/patch without applying.

re_render.description: Whether to trigger a full re-render to MP4 after the edit is applied.

write_edit_report.description: Whether to append a summary of changes to output/edit-instructions.md.

output_path.description: Custom output directory if different from default output/. Example: output/v2/.
